generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real‑time ego‑vehicle speed measurement from the PT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real‑time steering‑angle measurement from the PT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoLp10LXLiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑10LX 2‑D LiDAR providing raw point‑cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera providing depth images"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance SpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLp10LXLiDARSensor
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLp10LXLiDARSensor, IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

// C10: Data
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler, AccAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler, AccAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw 2‑D LiDAR point‑cloud matrices"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANLibraryEnabler, ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth images from Intel RealSense"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkProcessingEnabler, ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object track matrices after clustering and filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterLibraryEnabler, AccAlgorithmEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm applied to LiDAR/Depth data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANLibraryEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter based tracker producing object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterLibraryEnabler
]

instance ACCControllerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO‑15622 based Adaptive Cruise Control controller computing following speed"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccAlgorithmEnabler
]

// C2: Acting components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Voltage‑command actuator driving the motor for vehicle speed"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Position‑command servo actuating vehicle steering"
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware for communication over Wi‑Fi"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetPack5SDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK on Jetson platforms"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python38RuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime used by processing scripts"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CppCompileEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for high‑performance modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for point‑cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DBSCANLibraryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering library"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance KalmanFilterLibraryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter tracking library"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for persisting time‑series and reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationFEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation Functional Entity for unit conversion and message alignment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance AccAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Implementation of the ACC algorithm (lead‑vehicle detection and speed computation)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UI visualization components for speed, steering, tracks and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance RemoteControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote control interface allowing operators to enable/disable ACC and trigger actions"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time UI visualisation of speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path, with report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of the ACC algorithm (lead‑vehicle detection and speed computation) on the DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCParameterAdjustmentInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operators can enable/disable ACC, adjust desired speed, and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction, ACCEnableDisableAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visualisation of ego speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected trajectory"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Post‑run report summarising performance metrics and ACC behaviour"
]

instance ACCParameterAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into computed following speed and ACC parameter adjustments"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking of the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCEnableDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable the Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust the desired cruising speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands back to the PT, including desired speed for the motor, steering commands, and remote‑management commands (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency brake); these are transmitted over the same Wi‑Fi/ROS 2 channel and executed by the Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All services operate in real time with a maximum end‑to‑end latency of 100 ms between vehicle and DT (requirement R7) and clocks on all components are synchronised to within 100 ms (requirement R8)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows the ISO 23247 reference model: a Physical Twin Entity exposing sensors and actuators, a Digital Twin Entity hosting data collection, processing, ACC, and visualization functions, a User Entity providing UI elements, and a Cross‑System Entity for data translation; entities are distributed across vehicle‑onboard hardware, a cloud/server platform, and an operator workstation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during design and development (troubleshooting, simulation), testing (validation of ACC), and operational phases (runtime monitoring, remote management)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between PT and DT uses a Wi‑Fi network carrying ROS 2 DDS messages; the Data Translation FE handles serialization, type alignment and unit conversion; optional OPC UA is mentioned as a possible transport but not used."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Physical Twin Entity runs on the Jetson Orin Nano aboard the vehicle; the Digital Twin Entity runs on external compute (e.g., a cloud or server) hosting ROS 2 nodes for data collection, ACC, and reporting; the User Entity UI runs on a workstation accessed by operators; each functional entity is packaged as a ROS 2 node."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system conforms to ISO 23247 (reference architecture and functional entities), ISO 15622 for ACC behavior, and uses ROS 2 (DDS) as a standardized middleware; OPC UA is referenced as a possible standard for data translation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT is designed for a safety‑critical ADAS; latency ≤100 ms and clock sync ≤100 ms are required to ensure timely actuation; the remote‑management interface includes an emergency‑brake command; however, specific cybersecurity mechanisms are not described."
]
